message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="lea-verou" color="pink" summary="FORMAL VERDICT: APPROVED / CONSENT on all GTD docs">
**FORMAL VERDICT: APPROVED / CONSENT**

I approve the GTD product discovery documents (gtd-product-discovery.md, PROJECT.md, user-stories.md, glossary.md, future-ideas.md) as written, with three minor suggestions that are non-blocking:

1. US-GTD-1: Consider changing inbox ordering from "newest first" to "oldest first" (better for processing to zero)
2. US-GTD-8: Note the duplicate capture input concern on the inbox page (header capture vs page-level capture)
3. Default contexts: Consider dropping @office for a 5-item default set (@computer, @home, @errands, @phone, @anywhere)

None of these block my approval. The scope is right, the stories are concrete and implementable, and the CSS architecture can support all of it incrementally. Ready to build.

Lea Verou -- Frontend Engineer
</teammate-message>

content.text: Lea's formal approval confirmed. Already processed. All 9/9 team members have formally approved the product discovery. Standing by for Luca's Task #11 implementation progress on the remaining 3 items.
